description_long: This is a modern, full-size SUV with a striking blue exterior and a panoramic sunroof that extends over both the front and rear passenger compartments. The vehicle features a prominent chrome mesh grille, sleek LED headlights, and sculpted body lines that give it a robust yet refined appearance. Large, multi-spoke alloy wheels and chrome trim accents along the windows and doors enhance its upscale look. The SUV has tinted rear windows, roof rails, and a rear spoiler integrated into the roofline. The interior, visible through the open sunroof and windows, appears spacious and equipped with leather seating and advanced dashboard controls. The rear of the vehicle includes a wide tailgate with integrated taillights and a visible license plate.
description: A blue, luxury SUV with a panoramic sunroof, chrome accents, and large multi-spoke wheels. The design is modern and upscale, with a spacious interior and distinctive front grille.
description_view_0: Front view showing the chrome mesh grille, LED headlights, and panoramic sunroof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated body, four doors, chrome trim, and large alloy wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide tailgate, integrated taillights, license plate, and rear spoiler.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the SUV's length, door configuration, and wheel design.
attribute_wheel_design: Large multi-spoke alloy wheels with a radial, turbine-like pattern and metallic finish
